3064250.name: War Drone FPV Quad Simulator
3064250.description:
Each new conflict brings new technological & skill challenges. The Russian-Ukrainian war only confirms this rule. WAR DRONE is a realistic FPV quadcopter flight simulator developed in collaboration with military drone operators of Ukrainian Armed Forces. We pay extra attention to the real experience of drones usage against an aggressor.

Key features:
  • Realistic flight physics
  • Accurate lens distortion
  • Payload mass customization
  • Battery discharge mechanics
  • Wind influence
  • Electronic warfare effects

Peaceful freestyle piloting experience is also included
